concept: Imagine an arcade game where I control a character who throws a special boomerang that creates a temporary time loop when it returns. Anything that happens between throws is repeated exactly when the boomerang returns, allowing for complex chain reactions and puzzle solutions. Enemies follow consistent patterns, so understanding their behaviors becomes crucial for setting up advantageous time loops. The narrative explores a world where time itself is breaking down, with areas where boomerang throws create increasingly unpredictable temporal effects.
